mapper.sql:
select invokeRecord.*,
detail.id detailId, detail.invoke_record_id, detail.model_name, detail.cost_token, detail.status detail_status, detail.cost_time detail_cost_time, detail.fail_reason detail_fail_reason, detail.start_time detail_start_time, detail.end_time detail_end_time, detail.user_input, detail.assistant_message,
lib.lib_name, app.app_name
join invoke_record_detail detail on invokeRecord.id = detail.invoke_record_id join knowledge_lib lib on invokeRecord.lib_id = lib.id join app app on invokeRecord.app_id = app.id
mapper.select: select count(*) from invoke_record invokeRecord join app app on invokeRecord.app_id = app.id

select count(*) total_count, sum(case when status = 1 then 1 else 0 end) success_count, sum(case when status = 0 then 1 else 0 end) fail_count, ifnull(( select sum(ifnull(detail.cost_token, 0)) from invoke_record_detail detail join invoke_record summary_record on summary_record.id = detail.invoke_record_id where summary_record.user_id = #{userId} ), 0) total_cost_token, ifnull(avg(cost_time), 0) avg_cost_time from invoke_record where user_id = #{userId}
